abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single configuration of Mail and Packages is allowed.

error.communication: Unable to connect or login to the mail server. Please check the log for details.
error.invalid_path: Please store the images in another directory.

user.description: Please enter the connection information of your mail server.
user.title: Mail and Packages (Step 1 of 2)

data.imap_timeout: Time in seconds before connection timeout (seconds, minimum 10)
data.amazon_days: Days back to check for Amazon emails
data.scan_all_emails: Scan all emails for tracking numbers (local only)
data.tracking_forward_enabled: Forward tracking numbers to a tracking service
data.llm_enabled: Use AI/LLM to analyze emails for tracking numbers
data.amazon_cookies_enabled: Track Amazon orders via browser cookies

config_2.description:
Finish the configuration by customizing the following based on your email structure and Home Assistant installation.

For details on the [Mail and Packages integration](https://github.com/moralmunky/Home-Assistant-Mail-And-Packages/wiki/Configuration-and-Email-Settings#configuration) options review the [configuration, templates, and automations section](https://github.com/moralmunky/Home-Assistant-Mail-And-Packages/wiki/Configuration-and-Email-Settings#configuration) on GitHub.

**Advanced Tracking** (bottom of form): Enable optional features to scan all emails for tracking numbers, forward to a tracking service (17track, AfterShip, AliExpress), use AI analysis, or track Amazon orders directly.
config_2.title: Mail and Packages (Step 2 of 2)

data.tracking_service_entry_id: Tracking service config entry ID (if required)
data.llm_model: LLM model name (e.g. llama3.2, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, gpt-4o-mini)

config_advanced.description:
Configure the advanced tracking features you enabled.

**Tracking Service**: Select which tracking service to forward discovered tracking numbers to. Supported: 17track, AfterShip, AliExpress Package Tracker. For 17track, enter the config entry ID (Settings > Devices & Services > 17Track > three-dot menu > Copy entry ID). AfterShip and AliExpress do not require an entry ID.

**AI/LLM Analysis**: 'ollama' runs locally (no data leaves your network). 'anthropic' and 'openai' send email content to their cloud APIs.

**PRIVACY NOTICE**: If using Anthropic or OpenAI, your email content will be sent to their servers. Only use this if you understand and accept this. Ollama keeps everything local.

**Amazon Cookies**: Paste your Amazon session cookies from your browser to poll order tracking directly.
config_advanced.title: Mail and Packages - Advanced Tracking

options_3.description:
Enter the path and file name to your custom no mail image below.

Example: images/custom_nomail.gif
options_3.title: Mail and Packages (Step 3 of 3)
